# Special Analysis

- [CNV analysis](./cnv_analysis.qmd)
 Copy-number variation analysis from Illumina array data using `conumee` package.

- [Age prediction](./age_prediction.qmd)
 Epigentic age prediction from Illumina array data using different age prediction algorithm.

- [Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)](./eda.qmd)
 Exploratory data analysis of the sample meta information using `dlookr` package

- [Bioimarker analysis](./biomarker_analysis.qmd)
 Biomarker analysis using `RandomForest` package, identifying signature CpGs and estimating *Area Under the Curve*
